document.source_title: Another day, another set of records fall to Kohli in IPL 2026 masterclass vs KKR

claims.claim_text: Virat Kohli scored his 10th T20 century.
Kohli is the first Indian to score 10 T20 centuries.
claims.evidence_text: He is the first Indian to have scored as many tons in the shortest format.

claims.claim_text: Kohli completed 14,000 T20 runs in 409 innings.
claims.evidence_text: He has got there in 409 innings, breaking Gayle’s record for the fastest to 14,000 T20 runs.

claims.claim_text: Kohli has the most appearances in IPL history.
claims.evidence_text: This was Kohli’s 279th IPL match, making him the player with most appearances in the league.

claims.claim_text: Kohli won the player of the match award.
claims.evidence_text: Kohli also won player of the match for his efforts.

entities.name: Virat Kohli
entities.description: Indian cricketer who plays for Royal Challengers Bengaluru.
entities.evidence_text: Virat Kohli came into Wednesday’s Indian Premier League (IPL) match with two back-to-back ducks behind him.

entities.name: Royal Challengers Bengaluru
entities.description: IPL team that Kohli plays for.
entities.evidence_text: He engineered Royal Challengers Bengaluru’s (RCB) six-wicket win over Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR).

entities.name: Kolkata Knight Riders
entities.description: IPL team that played against RCB.
entities.evidence_text: He engineered Royal Challengers Bengaluru’s (RCB) six-wicket win over Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR).

events.event: IPL match between RCB and KKR
events.evidence_text: Kohli admitted that the two previous ducks was on his mind when he walked out in Raipur on Wednesday.
